gauge.name: Sabine River near Mineola

impacts.statement: Expect several flooded barns and farm buildings.

Expect a couple of flooded barns.  Also expect water to overflow the bridge approaches to Farm to Market Highway 1804 between Hoard and Lindale.  Expect several hundred acres of flooded pasturelands next to the river both upstream and downstream.  Move livestock and equipment to higher ground.
Expect flooding of low river bottoms with secondary roadways along with picnic and recreational areas becoming inundated as well. Ranchers should move cattle and equipment to higher ground.
Expect flooding of secondary roadways with picnic and recreational areas flooded as well.  Also expect flooded boat ramps as well.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are issued as needed during times of high water, but are not routinely available.
